MORGANBERSERKER-QUEENS_SCEPTER.title: Rhongomyniad, the Queen's Scepter
MORGANBERSERKER-QUEENS_SCEPTER.descripti: #The first time you change form each combat: gain 1 Energy, draw 1 card and 10 NP Charge.
MORGANBERSERKER-QUEENS_SCEPTER.flavor: The lance that anchors the world's end, whittled down to a scepter. The Queen requires no other proof of her right to rule.
MORGANBERSERKER-WORLDS_END_CORONATION.de: #Whenever you change form: gain 1 Energy (max once per turn).
MORGANBERSERKER-WORLDS_END_CORONATION.fl: Berserker and witch, tyrant and savior. At the end of the world, every crown is hers.
MORGANBERSERKER-EXISTENCE_TAX.title: Existence Tax
MORGANBERSERKER-EXISTENCE_TAX.descriptio: #At the end of your turn: gain NP Charge equal to the enemies' total Curse (max !NpCharge!).
MORGANBERSERKER-EXISTENCE_TAX.flavor: All who exist in Fairy Britain owe the Queen. Payment is collected either way.
MORGANBERSERKER-SPRIGGAN_TREASURY.title: Spriggan's Treasury
MORGANBERSERKER-SPRIGGAN_TREASURY.flavor: The Queen's hoard, guarded without rest. Spriggan counts every coin twice.
MORGANBERSERKER-MIRROR_CLAN_GLASS.title: Mirror Clan's Mirror
MORGANBERSERKER-MIRROR_CLAN_GLASS.flavor: The Mirror Clan never shows the face you expect. The Queen finds this most useful.
MORGANBERSERKER-BOTTLED_MORS.title: Bottled Mors
MORGANBERSERKER-BOTTLED_MORS.description: #When an enemy dies with Curse: its Curse jumps to a random enemy.
MORGANBERSERKER-BOTTLED_MORS.flavor: A curse given form, scratching at the glass. Do not uncork it. It uncorks itself.
MORGANBERSERKER-HABETROT_THREAD.title: Habetrot's Thread
MORGANBERSERKER-HABETROT_THREAD.descript: #The first time Guts triggers each combat: survive at 10 HP instead of 1.
MORGANBERSERKER-HABETROT_THREAD.flavor: The smallest of fairies spins the longest of threads. Even a tyrant's life may be mended once.
MORGANBERSERKER-LADY_OF_THE_LAKE_CHALICE: Chalice of the Lady of the Lake
#Palingenesis: gain !MaxHp! Max HP. While held, limits break: Bond can reach level 12 and NP level can reach 6.
Vivian's gift to the queen she once crowned. A wish that surpasses the maximum.
MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_SUMMON_SEAL.title: Queen's Summon Seal
MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_SUMMON_SEAL.descr: #At card rewards you may give up the card to roll the gacha: 50% chance of a dupe, +25% per failed roll. A dupe raises Morgan's NP level (the counter, max 5), increasing her Noble Phantasm cards' power by 15% per level.
MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_SUMMON_SEAL.flavo: You wish to summon the Queen again? Then present a catalyst worthy of her.
MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_BOND.title: Oath to the Queen
MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_BOND.description: #Morgan earns Bond points from combat victories (/+2, Elites /+3, Bosses /+5) and from entering events, shops and rest sites (/+1). Each *Bond* level grants permanent gifts: Max HP (Lv 1/3/6/9), starting *NP *Charge (Lv 2/5/8), starting Curse on ALL enemies (Lv 4/7) - and at Lv 10, the Queen has found something to live for: start each combat with Guts (survive lethal damage at 1 HP). As an ascended Servant, your damage and Block are increased by 25%. In multiplayer, the defensive gifts scale with the player count.
MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_BOND.flavor: Serve well, and the Queen of Fairy Britain may permit you to stand beside her throne.
